name: Pokémon Data MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server providing detailed Pokémon data and information through a standardized MCP interface using the PokéAPI. Enables AI agents to retrieve comprehensive Pokémon information — stats, moves, abilities, evolutions, and game data — supporting Pokémon-themed applications and fan projects.
use_cases: Building Pokémon reference applications and Pokédex assistants with AI
Creating game strategy tools using Pokémon stat and move data
Developing fan projects and educational tools about the Pokémon franchise
Enabling AI chatbots to answer Pokémon-related questions accurately
not_for: Commercial Pokémon merchandise (requires Nintendo/Game Freak licensing)
Production applications requiring data freshness guarantees
Non-entertainment use cases (specialized gaming data tool)
best_when: A developer building a Pokémon fan application, educational tool, or game assistant wants AI agents to access comprehensive Pokémon data through a clean MCP interface.
avoid_when: You need real-time game data or commercial licensing. PokéAPI data is for non-commercial fan projects. Always check Nintendo's fan content policy.

auth.notes: No auth required. PokéAPI is a free public API with rate limits.

pricing.free_tier_limits: PokéAPI is free for non-commercial use; rate limits apply
pricing.notes: Free open source. PokéAPI is free for non-commercial fan projects.

performance.rate_limits: PokéAPI rate limits apply; typically adequate for fan projects

known_agent_gotchas: PokéAPI is for non-commercial fan projects — check Nintendo fan content policy
Data only covers main series Pokémon games — coverage ends at latest PokéAPI release
PokéAPI rate limits can affect high-volume Pokémon data queries
Pokémon names and IDs have changed across generations — handle versioning carefully
agent_readiness.security_notes: Public API with no auth. Non-commercial use only per PokéAPI terms. No sensitive data. Low security risk.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public API. Non-commercial use. No sensitive data. Non-commercial use terms apply.
